scripts.lint: pnpm check:versions && pnpm check:dom-boundaries && pnpm typecheck
scripts.desktop:release:all: node -e "console.error('Desktop releases must use the manual GitHub Actions Desktop Release workflow. Use desktop:dist:* for local build-only artifacts.'); process.exit(1)"
scripts.desktop:release:linux: node -e "console.error('Desktop releases must use the manual GitHub Actions Desktop Release workflow. Use desktop:dist:* for local build-only artifacts.'); process.exit(1)"
scripts.desktop:release:mac: node -e "console.error('Desktop releases must use the manual GitHub Actions Desktop Release workflow. Use desktop:dist:* for local build-only artifacts.'); process.exit(1)"
scripts.desktop:release:win: node -e "console.error('Desktop releases must use the manual GitHub Actions Desktop Release workflow. Use desktop:dist:* for local build-only artifacts.'); process.exit(1)"
scripts.test: pnpm check:versions && pnpm check:dom-boundaries && vitest run
